name: SA Workspace
description: Solution Architect workspace with Salesforce tools and daily workflows

prompts.label: Customer Outreach
prompts.prompt: Help me identify customers who need outreach based on recent activity and upcoming renewals.

prompts.label: Latest Activities Filed
prompts.prompt: Show me the latest activities I've filed in Salesforce this week.

prompts.label: SA Highlight
prompts.prompt: Generate a highlight summary of my SA activities for leadership review.

prompts.label: Log Thought Leadership
prompts.prompt: Help me log a thought leadership activity in Salesforce.

globalPrompts.label: Log Insight
globalPrompts.prompt: Help me log a customer insight or technical discovery to Salesforce.
